## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do? Why? Link to any relevant issues. -->

Fixes # (issue)

## Type of Change

- [ ] `feat` — New feature
- [ ] `fix` — Bug fix
- [ ] `refactor` — Code restructuring (no behavior change)
- [ ] `chore` — Dependency updates, config changes
- [ ] `docs` — Documentation only
- [ ] `test` — Tests only
- [ ] `ci` — CI/CD changes
- [ ] `perf` — Performance improvement

## Testing

<!-- How did you verify this change? -->

- [ ] Unit tests added / updated (`bun run test:unit`)
- [ ] Integration tests added / updated
- [ ] Manually tested in browser

## Checklist

- [ ] `bun run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `bun run check` (Biome) passes with no errors
- [ ] No console errors or warnings in the browser
- [ ] Accessibility: new UI is keyboard-navigable and has ARIA labels
- [ ] `docs/ACTIVITY_LOG.md` updated with a timestamped entry
- [ ] No secrets committed (`.env.local` excluded via `.gitignore`)
